svg.title: LFR Circuit Schematic
svg.desc: Schematic diagram showing Arduino Uno connected to L298N motor driver, 5 IR sensors, two DC motors, and a 12V battery with 5V regulator

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the 12V battery power the LFR circuit?')
sendPrompt('Why do we need a 5V regulator for the Arduino?')
sendPrompt('What pins does the Arduino use for the LFR?')
sendPrompt('How does the L298N motor driver work?')
sendPrompt('How is the left DC motor wired to the L298N?')
sendPrompt('How is the right DC motor wired to the L298N?')
sendPrompt('How does the leftmost IR sensor S0 work?')
sendPrompt('How does IR sensor S1 work?')
sendPrompt('Why is the center sensor S2 the most important?')
sendPrompt('How does IR sensor S3 work?')
sendPrompt('How does the rightmost IR sensor S4 work?')

svg.text: ENA=D9 ENB=D6 IN1=D8 IN2=D7 IN3=D5 IN4=D4
★ S2 low = on line; high = off line (dark surface absorbs IR)
